title: Part 8 – Passages multiples : fin d'essai d'un logiciel
instructions: Lisez les deux documents, puis répondez aux questions en faisant le lien entre eux.

passages.label: E-mail du fournisseur
passages.text:
From: CloudDesk Solutions
To: Amir Hassan, IT Manager
Subject: Your Free Trial is Ending Soon

Dear Mr. Hassan,

Your 30-day free trial of CloudDesk Pro will end on April 20th. To continue using all premium features, including unlimited storage and priority support, please upgrade to a paid plan before this date.

The Standard plan costs $8 per user per month, while the Premium plan costs $15 per user per month and includes advanced security features.

If you do not upgrade, your account will automatically switch to the Basic (free) plan, which has a 5 GB storage limit per user.

To upgrade, simply log in to your account and click 'Manage Subscription'.

Best regards,
CloudDesk Solutions

passages.label: E-mail interne d'Amir Hassan
passages.text:
From: Amir Hassan
To: Department Managers
Subject: Re: CloudDesk Subscription Decision

Hi all,

After reviewing our usage over the past month, our 40 employees have used an average of 12 GB of storage each, well above the free plan's limit.

Given our security requirements for client data, I recommend we go with the plan that includes advanced security features, even though it costs more per user.

I'll process the upgrade by April 18th to avoid any service interruption. Let me know if you have any concerns before then.

questions.prompt: What will happen if Amir does not upgrade before April 20th?
choices: The account will switch to the free Basic plan
The trial will be extended automatically
questions.explanation: "If you do not upgrade, your account will automatically switch to the Basic (free) plan".

questions.prompt: How much storage does the free Basic plan offer per user?
questions.explanation: "the Basic (free) plan, which has a 5 GB storage limit per user".

questions.prompt: Why is the Basic plan not suitable for the company, according to Amir's email?
choices: Employees use more storage than the plan allows
It does not support mobile devices
questions.explanation: Les employés utilisent en moyenne 12 Go chacun, bien plus que la limite de 5 Go du plan gratuit.

questions.prompt: Which plan does Amir recommend, and why?
choices: The Standard plan, because it is cheaper
The Premium plan, because of its advanced security features
The Basic plan, because it is free
No plan, because the trial should be cancelled
questions.explanation: Il recommande le plan incluant les fonctionnalités de sécurité avancées (le Premium), malgré son coût plus élevé.

questions.prompt: By what date does Amir plan to process the upgrade?
questions.explanation: "I'll process the upgrade by April 18th to avoid any service interruption".
